entries.title: Fresh-Lead Discovery — Business Contract
verified_against: spec IA sprint 1 (2026-07-13): content-preserving extraction from multi-group-fresh-lead-crawl-spec §1/§9; section mapping in the PR
entries.notes: Business layer of the fresh-lead-discovery experience: problem, users, value, lead-volume goals, business exclusions. Extracted verbatim from the PR-M0 spec during the spec IA sprint 1 split; inherits its draft status.

entries.title: Fresh-Lead Discovery — Operator Experience
verified_against: spec IA sprint 1 (2026-07-13): content-preserving extraction from multi-group-fresh-lead-crawl-spec §3/§9/§10 operator surfaces + crawler-account-safety-spec §3 invariant; section mapping in the PR
entries.notes: Experience layer of fresh-lead-discovery: operator flow, exclusion transparency (why 40 posts -> 3 leads), human_required behavior, waiting_for_connector_upgrade surfacing. Operator message catalog stays with the account-safety state machine (single source); this doc references it.
